plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Energy Above Hull vs Band Gap
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between energy above hull and band gap for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Understanding the relationship between energy above hull and band gap helps identify materials that are both stable and have suitable electronic properties.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Band Gap vs Density
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between band gap and density for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Exploring the relationship between band gap and density can help identify materials with optimal electronic and physical properties.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and energy above hull for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Analyzing the relationship between density and energy above hull can help identify stable materials with suitable physical properties.

plot_candidates.title: Histogram of Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: This histogram shows the distribution of energy above hull values for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: The distribution of energy above hull values helps assess the stability of the materials.

plot_candidates.title: Histogram of Density
plot_candidates.description: This histogram shows the distribution of density values for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: The distribution of density values provides insights into the physical characteristics of the materials.

plot_candidates.title: Histogram of Band Gap
plot_candidates.description: This histogram shows the distribution of band gap values for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: The distribution of band gap values helps understand the electronic properties of the materials.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Band Gap vs Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between band gap and energy above hull for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: This plot helps in identifying materials that are both stable and have suitable electronic properties.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Band Gap
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and band gap for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Understanding the relationship between density and band gap can help in selecting materials with optimal properties.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Energy Above Hull vs Density
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between energy above hull and density for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: This plot helps in identifying stable materials with suitable density for high-voltage applications.

plot_candidates.title: 3D Scatter Plot of Energy Above Hull, Band Gap, and Density
plot_candidates.description: This 3D scatter plot shows the relationship between energy above hull, band gap, and density for the retrieved materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: A 3D plot provides a comprehensive view of how these three critical properties interact, aiding in the selection of optimal materials.
